message.content:
Test file: src/game-of-life.spec.ts
Implementation file: src/game-of-life.ts
Passing tests: 4
Recent changes: Added minimal neighbor detection to eliminate cells with exactly 4 neighbors (overpopulation case)

Refactor the implementation while keeping all tests green.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to next test after completion.
